title: Sky Island
description: "Lighten up the end with this pack." Retextures and slightly alters The End into a divinely themed dimension.
body:
# Note (Only for v1.0)
**REQUIRES OptiFine**

**The uploaded file is the datapack. However, it comes with the actual texture pack (resourcepack). Nonetheless, both are required. I recommend using the main download button if you don't know where to find the additional file**
# Sky Island Pack
This pack basically retextures The End and related items, turning it into The Sky Dimension. It gives you a different experience of Minecraft's concept of "the end", a dimension with divine and somewhat heavenly vibes in contrast to the eerie and mysterious nature of the original End Dimension. Sky dimension lets you feel eternity rather than uncertainty in exploring it.
# Changes
To specify, here is the list of changes in the game
## Texture
### Dimension
- End Sky
### Blocks and Items
- End Stone, End Stone Bricks, and Variants
- Purpur Block and Variants
- Whole End Portal
- Chorus Plant
- Ender Chest
- Shulker Shell
- Dragon Head
- End Rod
- Elytra
- End Crystal
### Mobs
- Enderman
- Endermite
- Ender Dragon
- Shulker
## Structure
### End Fountain
- Replaced the Torch with Soul Torch
### End City/Ship
- Replaced banners to match the aesthetic
- Changed the color of windows to yellow
## Others
### End Crystals
- When placed in The End, produce soul fire instead
## Optional Features
- Recolors particles for enderman and endermite (nether portal particles affected)
### Supported mods for optional features
- *OptiFine for the meantime. I will edit this once I finish testing other mods like colormatic and recolor*
# From the Creator,
Note that I'm not an artist of any related kind nor a coder, so I wouldn't assure this as quality content. Rather, I want to bring my imagination to life, and I want to share this to you, especially pack creators, to give new ideas. If you do so, let me see. And by the way, these textures turned out to be so since I really put some lore behind each. Thank you
